title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Supporting Actress
text: Winner: Teyana Taylor for One Battle After Another. Nominees: Emily Blunt (The Smashing Machine), Elle Fanning (Sentimental Value), Ariana Grande (Wicked: For Good), Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas (Sentimental Value), Amy Madigan (Weapons). Taylor's win for her role in the Warner Bros. Pictures film was among multiple awards that the Paul Thomas Anderson-directed comedy-drama secured throughout the evening.
